chosen_action.title: Fresh distribution execution: Claude Code Alternatives submission

why_this_action.summary: Used a fresh high-intent Claude Code comparison directory from the distribution-reset queue to put Ralph Workflow in front of evaluator traffic that is already looking for Claude Code alternatives, while keeping Codeberg as the primary destination.
shared_findings_used: adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg remains the primary success metric and is flat
marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json: current bottleneck is distribution and message to primary repo conversion
market_intelligence_latest.json: competitor/comparison positioning is already mapped and reusable
distribution_reset_targets_latest.json: Claude Code Alternatives was a fresh untouched high-intent target
outreach-log.md: verified this domain had not already been contacted or submitted

verification.initial_post: POST multipart form to https://claude-code-alternatives.com/tool/ returned HTTP 302 with Location https://claude-code-alternatives.com/submitter/projects
verification.dedupe_check: Immediate second submission attempt returned validation error 'The url has already been taken.', indicating the Codeberg URL is now recorded by the directory

expected_outcome.goal: Earn a new high-intent comparison-directory listing that can send Claude Code alternative traffic to the primary Codeberg repo.
expected_outcome.success_metric: Live listing or curator follow-up plus eventual Codeberg traffic/adoption movement
expected_outcome.replacement_condition: If no listing evidence or reply exists by 2026-06-07, treat this target as non-converting and switch the next fresh run to a different demand-capture lane instead of another directory-family repeat.
